title: Space/join: custom method for redeeming invite codes and joining public Spaces
description:
Why: Space/join is a distinct custom JMAP method defined in the spec (separate from SpaceInvite/set) for two cases: (1) redeeming a SpaceInvite code to join a Space, and (2) joining a public Space (isPublic: true) without a code. It is not the same as SpaceInvite/set accept action.

What:
- Space/join method: accountId + spaceId + optional inviteCode
- Handle success: server adds owner to Space.members, returns updated Space state
- Handle errors: inviteExpired, inviteUsed, notPublic, alreadyMember
- Fixture tests for join-by-code and join-public paths
close_reason: superseded by x2d.5 (space_create and space_join implemented there)
